title: Fill in the blanks - Employee Salary Calculation

content.problemStatement:
Complete the missing parts in the code to demonstrate the use of protected access modifiers in C++ classes. The Employee class stores basic information such as name and salary, and the Manager class, which inherits from Employee, calculates the bonus based on the salary.

---

sampleTestCases.output:
Employee Name: John Doe
Salary: 50000
Bonus: 5000
